meaning: Technical Assistance Administration (联合国)技术援助管理处
examples: To compare the total antioxidant activity (TAA) of commercial orange juices.
Also seen, but without speaking roles, are Orn Free Taa, Chancellor Palpatine, Mas Amedda and Captain Typho.
Verified by network response surface, TAA was improved to be an applied and valid method of calculating the risk occurrence probability.
This new demand for tying together TAA and the pending trade agreements is causing a stir.
We also want and believe that we should have an agreement from Congress to extend TAA, Trade Assistance Authority.
